heading: Dependency and disability decisions
label: 778 Dependency and disability decisions
text: The General Counsel of the Government Accountability Office shall decide a question of dependency, disability, or dependency and disability under sections 773–776 of this title. A decision under this section is final.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)77831:43b(h)., , § 319(h); added , , .June 10, 1921, ch. 1842 Stat. 20Pub. L. 86–8773 Stat. 198July 13, 1959The words “arising” and “and conclusive” are omitted as surplus.
Amendments2004— substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271
